gaps.title: No body manifest for Inquisition
gaps.description: INQUISITION root has identity/contract/gate/tui but no BODY manifest path.
gaps.proposed_cure: Create Inquisition body package V0_2 with body manifest and capability/foundation blocks.

gaps.title: Missing checker/schema/registry coverage
gaps.description: No dedicated checker scripts, schema files, or registry index under Inquisition root.
gaps.proposed_cure: Add anti-fake-green/dirty/duplicate checkers and evidence schema pack in V0_2.

gaps.title: Incomplete five-organ registration cards
gaps.description: Current organ cards in Administratum cover Mechanicus and Officio, but not Inquisition and Astronomicon within organ cards directory.
gaps.proposed_cure: Implement File Atlas/passport indexing task to normalize full 5-organ card coverage.

gaps.title: Body representation not normalized to explicit BODY manifest
gaps.description: Mechanicus uses strong identity/state/contracts but no dedicated BODY manifest file under BODY/.
gaps.proposed_cure: Create compact BODY manifest aligned with existing identity/contract layer.

gaps.title: No unified file-passport index for IDE read-only drilldown
gaps.description: All five organs expose useful artifacts, but there is no unified passport index for stable IDE panel navigation.
gaps.proposed_cure: Run File Atlas/Passport index task as immediate next step.
